decision_dimensions.description: Whether the decision affects data compliance
Whether the decision involves PII or customer data

strategic_goals.label: Revenue Growth
strategic_goals.description: Expand global revenue through new markets and customer acquisition

strategic_goals.label: Cost Stability
strategic_goals.description: Maintain operational cost discipline and budget adherence

strategic_goals.label: Data Compliance
strategic_goals.description: Ensure all data handling meets regulatory requirements (SOC2, GDPR, CCPA)

strategic_goals.label: Engineering Velocity
strategic_goals.description: Increase engineering output and reduce time-to-ship for product features

governance_rules.name: CFO Approval for Spend Over $50K
governance_rules.description: Any expenditure exceeding $50,000 requires CFO sign-off before commitment

governance_rules.name: Board Approval for Spend Over $200K
governance_rules.description: Any expenditure exceeding $200,000 requires board-level approval

governance_rules.name: Legal Sign-off for Customer Data Usage
governance_rules.description: Any decision involving customer data requires General Counsel review

governance_rules.name: Procurement Review for Vendor Contracts Over $100K
governance_rules.description: Vendor contracts exceeding $100,000 require procurement review and CFO approval

consequence.message: Vendor contract exceeds $100K threshold — procurement review required

governance_rules.name: HR and Department Head Approval for Hiring
governance_rules.description: All hiring decisions require both HR and the relevant department head approval

consequence.message: Hiring requires HR + department head approval

governance_rules.name: Q4 Spending Freeze
governance_rules.description: No new discretionary spend commitments after October 15 in Q4 (informal policy announced by CFO)

consequence.message: Q4 spending freeze may apply — verify with CFO

governance_rules.name: CTO Dev Tool Procurement Bypass
governance_rules.description: CTO has been observed bypassing formal procurement for developer tools under $20K (pattern inferred from Jira tickets, never formally documented)

consequence.message: CTO dev tool bypass pattern detected — consider formalizing

goal_conflicts.description: Engineering hiring velocity vs budget stability
Sales revenue growth vs data compliance requirements
Fast engineering shipping vs privacy review requirements
